productDisplayName: Myntra Men Your Idea Sucks Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately Do not bleach, do not dry clean, do not tumble dry Warm iron, iron print on reverse Spun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this is a blissfully cosy T-shirt, and it follows our favourite trend - statement tees! Sporting 'Your Idea Sucks' text on the chest, this tee from myntra gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer uniform. Style it with checked shorts, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
